name: AnomalyGuard
description: Real-time anomaly detection service ingesting event streams and scoring with seasonal hybrid ESD and LSTM ensemble.

milestones.name: Shadow Traffic to 100%
milestones.notes: Requires Datadog alert tuning and rollback SLOs

milestones.name: Prod Cutover
milestones.notes: Contingent on feature drift threshold finalization

risks: Drift thresholds not finalized; risk of false positives
Terraform state lock held by Michael’s user on last changes
IAM privilege dependency on 'ml-admin' for emergency rollback

name: Feature Store Migration (Feast)
description: Migration from custom Postgres-based feature store to Feast with online store in Redis and offline store in Snowflake.

milestones.name: Complete High-Priority Feature Migration
milestones.notes: Blockers: Redis failover tests pending with SRE

risks: Redis failover not validated under peak load
Access controls need review to prevent PII exposure
handover_docs: Confluence: Data Privacy Guardrails for Features

name: FraudShield v3
description: Production fraud detection model and service; v3 includes retraining pipeline and canary release strategy.

milestones.name: June retraining cycle
milestones.notes: Requires Snowflake credits and Databricks cluster ML-XL

risks: GitHub branch protection override can bypass reviews
Personal Databricks PAT used in one legacy job
Missing secondary approver for canary promotion
